form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh after showing early speed, behind Paddy Mach at Young over 1720m in a NR up to 37 on March 24 at $4. Then a handy effort when a close third behind Letstacoboutit at Junee over 1760m in a NR up to 33 on March 31 at $26. Progressing well. Top chance in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into seventh after showing early speed, behind Paddy Mach at Young over 1720m in a NR up to 37 on March 24 at $4. Then a handy effort when a close third behind Letstacoboutit at Junee over 1760m in a NR up to 33 on March 31 at $26. Progressing well. Top chance in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced passing the 400m when Glamors Symbolwas giving ground.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth behind Muriel at Junee over 1760m in a NR up to 31 on February 24 at $71. Then a handy effort when beaten by 9 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Weeneeddreams at Leeton over 1758m in a NR up to 33 on March 10 at $7.50. Winning prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into ninth behind Muriel at Junee over 1760m in a NR up to 31 on February 24 at $71. Then a handy effort when beaten by 9 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Weeneeddreams at Leeton over 1758m in a NR up to 33 on March 10 at $7.50. Winning prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dropped its near-side knee boot during the middle stages of the race.
Near side sulky wheel deflated inside the final 150m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr3) over 1760m at Junee beaten 35 m by Blues Terror (2:13.80) in NR up to 32 on March 17 at $34. Before that 7th (Fr1) over 1635m at this track was 5th-9.8 at the bell, beaten 18 m by Bidgee Babe (2:02.60) in NR up to 35 on March 3 at $23. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground from the 500m to finish in 7th position beaten 46.5m.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr1) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 5th-11 beaten 11 m by Letstacoboutit (2:14.30) in NR up to 33 on March 31 at $21. At the run before 5th (Sr1) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 22 m by Blues Terror (2:13.80) in NR up to 32 on March 17 at $5.50. Can make amends.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up in the early stages of the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr1) over 1760m at Junee was 10th-19.8 at the bell, beaten 16 m by Letstacoboutit (2:14.30) in NR up to 33 on March 31 at $16. At the start before 10th (Fr5) over 1760m after showing early speed at Junee, beaten 45 m by Blues Terror (2:13.80) in NR up to 32 on March 17 at $4. Capable of a better showing.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr3) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 35 m by Letstacoboutit (2:14.30) in NR up to 33 on March 31 at $34. Two runs back 3rd (Fr4) over 1760m after showing early pace at Junee, beaten 18 m by Blues Terror (2:13.80) in NR up to 32 on March 17 at $23. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten 35.1m.
Yielded ground from the 400m to finish in 9th position beaten 51.2m.
Held up for clear running for the majority of the home straight.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was well back in the run when 9th (Fr5) over 1720m after showing early pace at Young, beaten 30 m by Paddy Mach (2:07.60) in NR up to 37 on March 24 at $41. Before that 4th (Fr1) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 19 m by Blues Terror (2:13.80) in NR up to 32 on March 17 at $7.50. This will be too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced behind the tiring Arklow near the 600m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind My Ultimate Franco at Riverina Paceway over 2270m in a NR up to 48 on March 20 at $101. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Letstacoboutit at Junee over 1760m in a NR up to 33 on March 31 at $3.30. Has definite claims.

formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into third behind My Ultimate Franco at Riverina Paceway over 2270m in a NR up to 48 on March 20 at $101. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Letstacoboutit at Junee over 1760m in a NR up to 33 on March 31 at $3.30. Has definite claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running in the home straight and not fully tested.
Near the 50m, taken in by Pad Thai which hung-in.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr3) over 1760m after showing early pace at Junee was 2nd-1.6 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Jungle Shark (2:13.40) in NR 34 to 38 on March 31 at $2.50. At her previous start 10th (Fr2) over 1758m after showing early pace at Leeton, well beaten by Wongalea Meg (2:13.10) in NR 34 to 35 on March 10 at $2.20. Expecting a much better run this time.

form.formComment: Began her campaign last start running was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1760m at Junee was 9th-17.6 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Letstacoboutit (2:14.30) in NR up to 33 on March 31 at $81. Must do a lot more.
